headline: Why Paychex, Inc. (PAYX) Is Still a Controversial Pick on Wall Street
summary: Paychex, Inc. (NASDAQ:PAYX) is among the most profitable software stocks to buy right now. On June 25, JPMorgan raised the price target on Paychex, Inc. (NASDAQ:PAYX) to $105 from $100, maintaining an Underweight rating. The firm sees the company’s Q4 results as solid. With an operating margin (ttm) of 38.32%, PAYX remains one of the […]
